text.tspan: Share of people who believe in climate change and think it's a serious
Participants were asked to score beliefs on a scale from 0 to 100 on four questions: whether action was necessary to avoid
a global catastrophe; humans were causing climate change; it was a serious threat to humanity; and was a global
Data source: Vlasceanu et al. (2024). Addressing climate change with behavioral science: A global intervention tournament in 63 countries.
Note: Based on survey data across almost 60,000 participants from 63 countries.
